3a789bf6-09ec-4dc6-9e2a-2d1c74d0ce41.canonical_name: Caroline gave talk about transgender journey

attrs.fact: On 9 June, 2023, Caroline gave a talk about her transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community.
attrs.quote: I talked about my transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:1; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]
Hey Melanie! How's it going? I wanted to tell you about my school event last week. It was awesome! I talked about my transgender journey and encouraged students to get involved in the LGBTQ community. It was great to see their reactions. It made me reflect on how far I've come since I started transitioning three years ago.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:2; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]
Hey Caroline! Great to hear from you. Sounds like your event was amazing! I'm so proud of you for spreading awareness and getting others involved in the LGBTQ community. You've come a long way since your transition - keep on inspiring people with your strength and courage!

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:3; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]
Thanks, Mel! Your backing really means a lot. I felt super powerful giving my talk. I shared my own journey, the struggles I had and how much I've developed since coming out. It was wonderful to see how the audience related to what I said and how it inspired them to be better allies. Conversations about gender identity and inclusion are so necessary and I'm thankful for being able to give a voice to the trans community.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:4; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]
Wow, Caroline, you're doing an awesome job of inspiring others with your journey. It's great to be part of it and see how you're positively affecting so many. Talking about inclusivity and acceptance is crucial, and you're so brave to speak up for the trans community. Keep up the great work!

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:6; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]

Thank you for using your voice to create love, acceptance, and hope. You're doing amazing!

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:7; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]
Your words mean a lot to me. I'm grateful for the chance to share my story and give others hope. We all have unique paths, and by working together we can build a more inclusive and understanding world. I'm going to keep using my voice to make a change and lift others up. And you're part of that!

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_3_D3:8; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=7:55 pm on 9 June, 2023]

attrs.fact: On 12 July, 2023, Caroline attended a transgender conference and felt accepted in a welcoming environment.

attrs.fact: On 23 August, 2023, Caroline applied to adoption agencies to give all her love to a child.
attrs.quote: I took the first step towards becoming a mom - I applied to adoption agencies! It's a big decision, but I think I'm ready to give all my love to a child.
attrs.comment: It's a big decision, but I think I'm ready to give all my love to a child!
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_13_D13:1; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=3:31 pm on 23 August, 2023]
Hi Melanie! Hope you're doing good. Guess what I did this week? I took the first step towards becoming a mom - I applied to adoption agencies! It's a big decision, but I think I'm ready to give all my love to a child. I got lots of help from this adoption advice/assistance group I attended. It was great!

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_13_D13:2; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=3:31 pm on 23 August, 2023]
Caroline, congrats! So proud of you for taking this step. How does it feel? Also, do you have any pets?

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_13_D13:3; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=3:31 pm on 23 August, 2023]
Thanks, Mel! Exciting but kinda nerve-wracking. Parenting's such a big responsibility. And yup, I do- Oscar, my guinea pig. He's been great. How are your pets?

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_13_D13:4; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=3:31 pm on 23 August, 2023]
Yeah, it's normal to be both excited and nervous with a big decision. And thanks for asking, they're good- we got another cat named Bailey too. Here's a pic of Oliver. Can you show me one of Oscar?

attrs.description: Rainbow flag mural that reflects the courage and strength of the trans community, with an eagle symbolizing freedom and pride.

7983cda0-66db-4a5b-baff-5321998ad25a.canonical_name: Caroline reflects on rainbow flag mural significance

attrs.fact: On 25 August, 2023, Caroline reflected on the significance of the rainbow flag mural, which reflects the courage and strength of the trans community and features an eagle symbolizing freedom and pride.
attrs.quote: The rainbow flag mural is important to me as it reflects the courage and strength of the trans community. The eagle symbolizes freedom and pride, representing my own resilience and that of others.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:13; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
Finding a community where I'm accepted, loved and supported has really meant a lot to me. It's made a huge difference to have people who get what I'm going through. Stuff like this mural are really special to me!

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:14; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
Caroline, glad you found a supportive community! Can you tell me more about why it's special to you?

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:15; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
The rainbow flag mural is important to me as it reflects the courage and strength of the trans community. The eagle symbolizes freedom and pride, representing my own resilience and that of others.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:16; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
I'm in awe of your courage as a trans person. Have you made any more art lately?

attrs.description: A stained glass window made for a local church to symbolize time changing our lives and show Caroline's journey as a transgender woman.

attrs.fact: On 25 August, 2023, Caroline created a stained glass window for a local church that symbolizes time changing our lives and shows her journey as a transgender woman.
attrs.quote: I made it to show my own journey as a transgender woman and how we should accept growth and change.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:17; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
Thanks, Mel! I made this stained glass window to remind myself and others that within us all is the key to discovering our true potential and living our best life.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:18; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
Wow, Caroline, that looks amazing! What inspired it?

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:19; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
Thanks! It was made for a local church and shows time changing our lives. I made it to show my own journey as a transgender woman and how we should accept growth and change.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_14_D14:20; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=1:33 pm on 25 August, 2023]
Wow, Caroline!  All those colors are incredible and the story it tells is so inspiring.

4f629282-f80f-4836-ba66-ad8d911c376e.canonical_name: Caroline volunteered at an LGBTQ+ youth center

attrs.fact: On 28 August, 2023, Caroline volunteered at an LGBTQ+ youth center and had a gratifying experience talking to similar young people.
attrs.quote: I've been chasing my ambitions and had the chance to volunteer at an LGBTQ+ youth center. It was so gratifying to talk to similar young people.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_15_D15:1; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=3:19 pm on 28 August, 2023]
Hey Melanie, great to hear from you. What's been up since we talked?

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_15_D15:2; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=3:19 pm on 28 August, 2023]
Hey Caroline! Since we last spoke, I took my kids to a park yesterday. They had fun exploring and playing. It was nice seeing them have a good time outdoors. Time flies, huh? What's new with you?

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_15_D15:3; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=3:19 pm on 28 August, 2023]
Wow, your kids had so much fun at the park! Being outdoors can be really enjoyable. A lot happened since our last chat. I've been chasing my ambitions and had the chance to volunteer at an LGBTQ+ youth center. It was so gratifying to talk to similar young people. It made me remember how essential it is to be kind and show support.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_15_D15:4; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=3:19 pm on 28 August, 2023]
That sounds great, Caroline. Volunteering is a great way to meet people. Creating community and supporting each other, especially for kids, is really important. How did you feel about your time there? Anything that sticks out to you?

c0563bbd-6764-4719-bc93-1f443a3b51ec.canonical_name: Caroline volunteered at an LGBTQ+ youth center

attrs.fact: On 28 August, 2023, Caroline volunteered at an LGBTQ+ youth center and had a gratifying experience talking to similar young people.
attrs.quote: I've been chasing my ambitions and had the chance to volunteer at an LGBTQ+ youth center. It was so gratifying to talk to similar young people.
attrs.original_text:
[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_15_D15:5; speaker=Caroline; listener=Melanie; session_time=3:19 pm on 28 August, 2023]
I loved it. It was awesome to see how strong the young people were, with all the challenges they face. I felt fulfilled guiding and supporting them. I even got to let them know they're not alone by sharing my story. Such a powerful, emotional experience.

[turn_id=conv-26_conv_session_15_D15:6; speaker=Melanie; listener=Caroline; session_time=3:19 pm on 28 August, 2023]
Was connecting with those young folks meaningful for you?

attrs.fact: On 22 October, 2023, Caroline shared her experience of receiving support from friends, family, and mentors during her transition, emphasizing how this support helped her find her true self and inspired her to pass on that support to others.
